identity.name: E1 Anti-AI Design System
identity.core_philosophy: Dark Mode Only. Glassmorphism. Neon Accents. Motion is Information.

typography.installation_instructions: Add these Google Fonts to public/index.html: Outfit (300,400,500,700), Plus Jakarta Sans (400,500,600), JetBrains Mono (400).

hero_section.structure: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[90vh] text-center relative overflow-hidden
elements: Tracing Beam Background: absolute inset-0 z-0
Badge: rounded-full border border-purple-500/30 bg-purple-500/10 px-4 py-1.5 text-sm text-purple-300 mb-8
Headline: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-bold bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-white/60 mb-6

bento_grid.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 p-4 md:p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto
bento_grid.card_style: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 hover:border-purple-500/50 transition-all duration-500

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl hidden md:flex flex-col
dashboard.widgets: rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-md p-6

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-purple-600 px-8 py-3 text-white font-medium hover:bg-purple-700 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-8 py-3 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/10 focus:border-purple-500/50 focus:ring-purple-500/20 rounded-xl h-12 px-4

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl

universal_guidelines: FORCE DARK MODE: Add 'dark' class to html/body tag.
NO DEFAULT SCROLLBARS: Customize webkit-scrollbar to be thin and dark.
MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Every clickable element must have a hover state (scale, glow, or color shift).
TEXT HIERARCHY: Never use pure white for body text. Use zinc-400 or zinc-300.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in this JSON.
Add the Google Fonts link to index.html.
implementation_order: Setup Global Styles (index.css) with new variables.
Build UI Primitives (Glass Card, Neon Button).
